de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class Modality

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.Modality
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, Sorted

    public final class Modality
extends AbstractSortedOperator
    This class is used to represent a dynamic logic modality like diamond and box (but also extensions of DL like preserves and throughout are possible in the future).

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static Modality BOX
      The box operator of dynamic logic.
      static Modality BOX_TRANSACTION
      A Java Card transaction version of the box modality.
      static Modality DIA
      The diamond operator of dynamic logic.
      static Modality DIA_TRANSACTION
      A Java Card transaction version of the diamond modality.
      private static Map<String,Modality> nameMap 
      static Modality TOUT
      The throughout operator of dynamic logic.
      static Modality TOUT_TRANSACTION
      A Java Card transaction version of the throughout modality.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      private Modality(Name name)
      creates a modal operator with the given name

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Modality getModality(String str)
      Returns a modality corresponding to a string
      boolean terminationSensitive()
      Whether this modality is termination sensitive, i.e., it is a "diamond-kind" modality.
      boolean transaction()
      Whether this is a transaction modality

      • Methods inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.Named

        name

    • Field Detail

      • nameMap

        private static final Map<String,Modality> nameMap

      • DIA

        public static final Modality DIA
        The diamond operator of dynamic logic. A formula Phi can be read as after processing the program alpha there exists a state such that Phi holds.

      • BOX

        public static final Modality BOX
        The box operator of dynamic logic. A formula [alpha;]Phi can be read as 'In all states reachable processing the program alpha the formula Phi holds'.

      • DIA_TRANSACTION

        public static final Modality DIA_TRANSACTION
        A Java Card transaction version of the diamond modality. Means that a transaction is currently underway.

      • BOX_TRANSACTION

        public static final Modality BOX_TRANSACTION
        A Java Card transaction version of the box modality. Means that a transaction is currently underway.

      • TOUT

        public static final Modality TOUT
        The throughout operator of dynamic logic. A formula [[alpha;]]Phi can be read as during processing the program alpha Phi should hold at every step of execution.

      • TOUT_TRANSACTION

        public static final Modality TOUT_TRANSACTION
        A Java Card transaction version of the throughout modality. Means that a transaction is currently underway.

    • Constructor Detail

      • Modality

        private Modality(Name name)
        creates a modal operator with the given name
        Parameters:
        name - the Name of the modality

    • Method Detail

      • getModality

        public static Modality getModality(String str)
        Returns a modality corresponding to a string
        Parameters:
        str - name of the modality to return

      • terminationSensitive

        public boolean terminationSensitive()
        Whether this modality is termination sensitive, i.e., it is a "diamond-kind" modality.
        Returns:

      • transaction

        public boolean transaction()
        Whether this is a transaction modality
